description: Case style: Stainless steel, rectangular gold toned case with branding at the backDial style: White dial with floral detailing, gold colour hands and markings, branding near the 12 hour mark, studded detail at the 12 hour markFeatures: Screw to reset timeStrap style: Genuine leather strap with an adjustable tang closure and loops to hold it in placeWater resistance: Up to 30 mWarranty: One year against manufacturing defects
